title: profile(scope) + map(scope)
userStory: As a consumer app, I want profile(scope) and map(scope) so that I can pull a whole domain as assembled context and discover what domains exist.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /profile?scope= gathers all chunks under the scope ordered by (path, position) and assembles them into Context{text (structured markdown), sources (path + id), truncated}
truncated is false when the slice fits the budget; the over-budget degrade path may be stubbed for Phase 1 (a single page always fits) but is documented
GET /map?scope= returns the source tree: a list of {path, title} under the scope, ordered by path
With one page ingested: profile(its path) returns the assembled page; map(parent scope) lists the one source; a non-matching scope returns empty
Verify: covered by the US-010 smoke
